goal: Create a planning-only internal safe-write architecture plan for future structured-family real writes before any GUI controls are designed or wired.
userDecision: Plan the internal safe-write architecture before designing or wiring user-facing controls for real writes.
safeWriteArchitecturePlan: separate review-only model from future execution model
separate draft editing from future write approval
separate rendered-record generation from future real config write
separate future executor implementation from future executor wiring
separate future executor wiring from first real config write
keep source/include and duplicate production activation as separate scopes
pipelineStagePlan: reread candidate from fixture or temporary config
boundaryObjectPlan: StructuredFamilyDraft remains in-memory until separate persistence approval
SafeWritePlan is future-only and not executable in this sprint
SafeWriteBackupPlan is future-only and does not create backups in this sprint
SafeWriteRollbackPlan is future-only and does not create rollback files in this sprint
SafeWriteApprovalState is future-only and requires explicit user approval
SafeWriteExecutionReceipt is future-only and cannot exist until real writes are approved
executorBoundaryPlan: executor is not reachable from current UI
executor is not wired to structured-family records
executor is not called by apply_setting_change
executor is not called by write_flow
executor cannot run without explicit implementation approval
executor cannot be wired without explicit wiring approval
executor cannot write without first-real-write approval
validationGatePlan: manual diff review before future execution
Hyprland verify-config or equivalent before future execution
rollback availability check before future execution
uiReachabilityBoundary: no user-facing real-write controls in this sprint
no Apply button wiring for structured-family real writes
no GTK control that can trigger real writes
current UI remains review-only for structured-family records
future UI design requires separate explicit approval
futureApprovalGates: approve executor architecture implementation planning before implementation planning starts
approve executor implementation before implementation starts
approve executor wiring before wiring starts
approve GUI real-write control design before GUI design starts
approve GUI real-write control wiring before wiring starts
approve backup execution before backup execution starts
approve restore execution before restore execution starts
approve rollback execution before rollback execution starts
approve reload policy before reload can be considered
approve runtime mutation policy before runtime mutation can be considered
approve first real config write before any real config write starts
nextRecommendedWork: Stop for explicit user decision: approve or reject future executor architecture implementation planning.
